case_title: ALEXANDER BULATAO VS. WILLIAMS COLE INC.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BULATAO, ALEXANDER AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS COLE INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA ATTORNEY'S DIVERSIFIED SERVICES JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BULATAO, ALEXANDER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILLIAMS COLE INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA ATTORNEY'S DIVERSIFIED SERVICES $10,871.28 PRINCIPAL, $46.11 INTEREST, $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,287.39, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
